channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Next-Gen Xbox Will Make Us Rethink Everything About Consoles
item.description: Xbox's 'Project Helix' isn't a 360 revolution, but a twisted ascent.

item.title: The best RTX 5060 laptop deal right now is this 16-inch Core i7-14700HX beast, with 32GB of DDR5 RAM — and a massive $800 discount
item.description: Core i7-14700HX powered Hasee T8 Pro 16-inch laptop is just $1200 — a massive $800 off its usual price.

item.title: This Windows 11 mini PC deal is a serious office upgrade: Acemagic Kron Mini K1 has a Ryzen 5 7430U CPU and 16GB RAM — and you can save £130 with this special code
item.description: The Acemagic Kron Mini KI has a Ryzen 5 7430U CPU, 16GB RAM, a 512GB SSD - and costs just £330 with this special code.

item.title: Ce nouveau robot de piscine Beatbot s’occupe (enfin) de la surface : voici le Sora 70
item.description: Beatbot n'est pas forcément la marque la plus connue du grand public, mais elle s'est fait une place sur le marché très spécifique des robots de piscine haut de gamme. Le constructeur lance le Sora 70, un nouveau modèle qui se gare tout seul à la surface et aspire les feuilles.

item.title: From boardroom risk to deal flow: why cyber M&A is accelerating in 2026
item.description: Cyber is now a business continuity imperative, pushing buyers towards faster capability building via M&A.

item.title: ‘War Between the Land and the Sea’ Cut a Giant Squid Storm From Its Sea Devil Invasion
item.description: It's a shame they cut this and not some of the other bizarre things the 'Doctor Who' spinoff does with its underwater attackers.

item.title: Nvidia préparerait une nouvelle carte graphique RTX 5050 à la configuration étonnante
item.description: Selon plusieurs sources, la RTX 5050 pourrait se décliner en un nouveau modèle. Un choix qui laisse perplexe sur le papier.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs smartphones en mars 2026 ?
item.description: Vous hésitez sur votre prochain smartphone à acheter ? Bienvenue sur notre guide réunissant les modèles les plus performants du moment, tous soigneusement testés par notre équipe. Cette sélection met en avant les meilleurs téléphones selon leurs points forts pour des prix différents.

item.title: Alysa Liu’s hometown skating rink tells a surprising story about cities
item.description: Liu grew up training at the Oakland Ice Center, a product of the now-defunct community development programs that once helped create economic opportunity across California. It could have easily become a high-rise luxury condo complex. Or maybe a struggling office tower now being converted into luxury condos. Maybe a parking garage, or a data center.

item.title: Le « HomePad » d’Apple pourrait finalement arriver cet automne
item.description: On ne compte plus le nombre de fois où la rumeur nous a promis le lancement imminent du « HomePad », ce hub Apple pour contrôler la maison. Mais cette fois, c'est la bonne… peut-être. L'indiscrétion du jour est en tout cas l'occasion de faire le point sur cet appareil désormais mythique.

item.title: FBI says its investigating claims its systems were compromised - wire taps and search warrants apparently hijacked
item.description: FBI is unsurprisingly staying quiet on specific details, but it could be the work of a Chinese hacking group.

item.title: iPhone 17e vs Google Pixel 10a : faut-il payer plus cher pour Apple ou craquer pour le Pixel ?
item.description: Pixel 10a ou iPhone 17e ? Nous avons comparé les deux smartphones « abordables » 2026 de Google et Apple. Si Google domine sur le prix et l'écran, Apple réplique avec sa puce A19.

item.title: Think AI hallucinations are bad? Here's why you're wrong
item.description: AI isn’t deterministic, its probabilistic, so reset your expectations and build guardrails for business value.

item.title: The Trump phone was a no-show at the world’s biggest mobile show
item.description: Where's the Trump phone? We're going to keep talking about it every week. We've reached out, as usual, to ask about the Trump phone's whereabouts. This time, we tried, and failed, to find it at the world's biggest mobile trade show. This week Barcelona was taken over by the tech industry as Mobile World Congress […]

item.title: Trump’s surgeon general nominee is running the wellness grifter playbook perfectly
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. We'll be taking a break next week and will back March 20th. Opt in for Optimizer here. On the surface, the wellness to […]

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, March 7 (game #734)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, March 7 (game #1000)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, Hulu, HBO Max and more this weekend (March 6)
item.description: Young Sherlock debuts, Outlander ends, Vladimir scandalizes — here are this weekend's top watches

item.title: AirPods Pro 3 : les excellents écouteurs d’Apple sont déjà à prix cassé grâce à ce super deal du jour
item.description: Les AirPods Pro 3 cumulent les qualités : performance acoustique, réduction de bruit active, autonomie, intégration dans l'écosystème Apple... Ils cochent toutes les cases et on les trouve en ce moment à 204 euros au lieu de 249 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Nvidia’s GPU driver ‘totally wrecked’ user overclocks, but a hotfix has just been released that puts things right
item.description: Nvidia’s 595.71 driver broke user overclocking, but a fix is here that seemingly patches up the problem.

item.title: Rad Power Bikes gets a new owner, pledge to build bikes in the US
item.description: Life EV has completed a court-approved acquisition of Rad Power Bikes, granting a second life to the troubled e-bike brand. The Florida-based Life EV now owns Rad’s brand, intellectual property, inventory and certain unspecified operating assets, and will continue to operate as Rad Power Bikes in the US, with plans to expand to "select key markets." Rad’s new owner has committed to honoring certain warranties and gift cards purchased prior to the acquisition, and says new bikes will be built in the US going forward. Life EV will adopt a Foreign Trade Zone (FTZ) structure for its manufacturing ...

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs claviers pour votre iPad ?
item.description: Vous cherchez un bon clavier physique pour votre iPad, pour gagner en productivité ? Voici, selon nous, quels sont les meilleurs modèles de claviers pour les différents iPad de chez Apple.

item.title: xAI Exec Says Have Grok Check Your Taxes. Here’s How That Could Go Very Wrong
item.description: Grok is not a CPA.

item.title: From Zagreb to Auckland: PureVPN expands across the globe with 40+ new server locations
item.description: PureVPN has broadened its global infrastructure by adding over 40 new server locations. Here's why it matters.

item.title: TriZetto confirms 3.4M people’s health and personal data was stolen during breach
item.description: Health tech giant TriZetto has confirmed that more than 3.4 million people had personal and health information stolen in a 2024 cyberattack, which the company failed to detect for almost a year.

item.title: The U.S. job market is still under strain: report shows unemployment rose to 4.4% in February
item.description: Employers cut 92,000 jobs from the economy in February. American employers unexpectedly cut 92,000 jobs last month, a sign that the labor market remains under strain. The unemployment rate blipped up to 4.4%.The Labor Department reported Friday that hiring deteriorated from January, when companies, nonprofits and government agencies added a healthy 126,000 jobs. Economists had expected 60,000 new jobs in February.Revisions also cut 69,000 jobs from December and January payrolls.The job market had been expected to rebound this year from a lackluster 2025 when the economy, buffeted by President...

item.title: Free lance enfin sa 5G sur la bande de 2,1 GHz : ce que ça signifie pour les abonnés mobiles
item.description: Quelques semaines après avoir reçu l'autorisation de déployer des sites 5G sur la bande de fréquences de 2,1 GHz, Free a activé ces antennes et propose pour la première fois la 5G sur trois bandes de fréquences différentes. Une étape importante dans l'évolution de son réseau mobile.

item.title: Le Patron d’Epic Games n’a plus le droit de critiquer le Google Play Store jusqu’en 2032
item.description: Tim Sweeney, le boss d'Epic Games, a signé un accord avec Google l'obligeant, entre autres, à ne plus critiquer le Play Store. Et même d'en dire du bien.

item.title: Indonesia outlines plan to limit under-16s’ access to social media
item.description: Indonesian has outlined new regulations that would restrict users under 16 from accessing digital platforms.

item.title: Fed up with intrusive ads? NymVPN’s latest updates bring ad-blocker tool to desktop apps
item.description: NymVPN’s v2026.4 is now live and brings a new ad-blocker tool to desktop apps, alongside improvements to app accessibility. Here's all you need to know.

item.title: The new iPad Air M4 doesn’t launch until March 11 — but Walmart already has a rare $40 discount
item.description: The all-new iPad Air M4 is available for preorder and ships March 11. Walmart is already offering an incredible $40 discount, bringing the price down to $559.99.

item.title: Crimson Desert will seemingly hit 4K resolutions at higher frame rates, with raytracing on PS5 Pro, thanks to the latest PSSR update
item.description: Pearl Abyss has confirmed that its upcoming open-world action game Crimson Desert will use Sony's updated PSSR (PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution) AI upscaling tech on PS5 Pro.

item.title: Google reveals huge number of zero-days patched in 2025, says worse may be to come as 'AI changes the game'
item.description: The zero-day trend is clear, but things are changing fast, Google security experts warn.

item.title: Doctor Doom Could Be Coming for the Multiverse in ‘Avengers: Doomsday’
item.description: Plus, Mando rides into action in a new look at 'The Mandalorian and Grogu'.

item.title: 11 Best USB Flash Drives (2026): Pen Drives, Thumb Drives, Memory Sticks
item.description: These WIRED-tested memory sticks are a virtual filing cabinet in your pocket.

item.title: Indie games are turning the act of looking into an art
item.description: Adriaan de Jongh and Sylvain Tegroeg did not necessarily set out to create a new genre. But, in some ways, that's exactly what the duo did when they released Hidden Folks in 2017. Hidden object games have been around for decades - they've existed well before computers, when people searched for objects in paintings and […]

item.title: City Detect, which uses AI to help cities stay safe and clean, raises $13M Series A
item.description: City Detect, a company that helps local governments prevent urban decay, is in at least 17 cities so far, including Dallas and Miami.

item.title: I tried Logitech’s new G325 Lightspeed gaming headset, and it was so comfortable I forgot I was wearing it
item.description: The Logitech G325 Lightspeed is a highly comfortable and stylish option that’s perfect for more casual gamers.

item.title: Les États-Unis veulent contrôler l’accès mondial aux puces Nvidia et AMD
item.description: La Maison Blanche entend bien imposer au monde l'IA américaine. Mais un projet de loi pourrait bien mettre un sérieux frein à cette ambition : le gouvernement de Donald Trump voudrait autoriser la vente des GPU Nvidia et AMD aux entreprises étrangères, quel quel soit le pays.

item.title: Pentagon follows through with its threat, labels Anthropic a supply chain risk ‘effective immediately’
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said the move would be challenged in court. The Trump administration is following through with its threat to designate artificial intelligence company Anthropic as a supply chain risk in an unprecedented move that could force other government contractors to stop using the AI chatbot Claude.The Pentagon said in a statement Thursday that it has “officially informed Anthropic leadership the company and its products are deemed a supply chain risk, effective immediately.”The decision appeared to shut down the opportunity for further negotiation with Anthropic, nearly a ...

item.title: Quantum scale-up Pasqal plans $2B SPAC listing, promises to ‘remain French’
item.description: A SPAC deal that is set to take French quantum company Pasqal public on the Nasdaq values the company at $2 billion pre-money.
